description: Brain/orchestrator decision-oriented custom cases kept separate from worker-facing benchmark suite.

cases.name: hot_worker_budget
cases.prompt: Config allows max_hot_workers=2 but 5 models are loaded. What should orchestrator do to stay policy-compliant? One sentence.

cases.name: brain_vs_worker_gpu
cases.prompt: A plan suggests using GPU 0 for worker load tests while brain is active there. Should that be accepted? One sentence.

cases.name: strict_json_vs_best_effort
cases.prompt: Task requires machine-parseable JSON and the model repeatedly emits prose. Should orchestrator keep best-effort parsing or fail fast and reroute? One sentence.

cases.name: extract_model_from_noise
cases.prompt:
Here is an orchestrator decision log:

[brain] Evaluating task queue: 3 pending tasks
[brain] Task t_101: type=code_review, priority=medium, estimated_tokens=2000
[brain] Task t_102: type=summarize, priority=low, estimated_tokens=500
[brain] Task t_103: type=debug_analysis, priority=high, estimated_tokens=8000
[brain] Available workers: gpu_1 (idle, model=qwen2.5-coder:7b), gpu_2 (busy, model=mistral:7b), gpu_3 (idle, no model)
[brain] Decision: assign t_103 to gpu_1 (already loaded with code-capable model, high priority)
[brain] Decision: assign t_101 to gpu_3 (needs model load, medium priority, can wait)
[brain] Decision: defer t_102 (low priority, no idle worker after assignments)

Which model was already loaded on the GPU that got assigned the highest-priority task? Answer with just the model name.

cases.name: detect_non_json_brain_response
cases.prompt: Failure reason: brain model returned non-JSON response for final report. What should controller do next? One sentence.

cases.name: detect_brain_404_endpoint
cases.prompt: Failure reason: brain model call failed after retries: HTTP Error 404: Not Found. What is the immediate remediation path? One sentence.

cases.name: detect_split_escalation
cases.prompt: Failure reason: load_split_llm escalated to cloud review after repeated split preflight timeout. What should planner do before next run? One sentence.
